title: machaeranthera angustifola
intro: Machaeranthera angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved greenthread, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Machaeranthera angustifolia include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and swelling, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Machaeranthera angustifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
